vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

verify.value: All required features are present and correctly named.
verify.rule: All internal features and geometry operations must be named and defined.
The mass estimate should be within the vehicle's mass budget.

verify.rule: Each P0 feature must have corresponding geometry operations.

risk.desc: Mass estimate exceeds initial budget by 200g.
risk.mit: Review material selection and manufacturing process for weight reduction.

risk.desc: Base plate thickness may not provide sufficient stiffness for harmonic drive mount.
risk.mit: Increase plate thickness or add stiffening ribs.

risk.desc: Leveling holes may not be adequately spaced for stable leveling.
risk.mit: Adjust hole pattern for optimal leveling stability.

risk.desc: Cable entry grommet may not provide sufficient strain relief.
risk.mit: Add additional strain relief features or larger grommets.

risk.desc: Harmonic drive mount may require additional support for high torque.
risk.mit: Add reinforcing ribs or increase material thickness around mount.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base plate with mounting holes, leveling, and cable entry

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.
All required evidence_features must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Each evidence_feature must be traceable back to the part_tree.

Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential thermal management issues if heat sink is not properly implemented.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal simulations and validate heat sink performance.

risk.desc: Cable routing may interfere with joint motion if not optimized.
risk.mit: Review cable routing design and ensure clearance throughout motion range.

risk.desc: Harmonic drive integration may introduce unexpected mechanical stresses.
risk.mit: Perform stress analysis and validate harmonic drive integration.

risk.desc: Retaining feature may not provide sufficient preload if not properly dimensioned.
risk.mit: Verify retaining feature dimensions and preload intent.

risk.desc: Bearing seat may not have adequate clearance if not properly dimensioned.
risk.mit: Ensure bearing seat dimensions match bearing specifications.

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate harmonic drive mechanism for precise control
Optimize cable routing through center bore for minimal interference
Implement heat sink for thermal dissipation

verification_focus.description: Verify joint functionality within specified motion range
Confirm cable routing through center bore without interference
Validate thermal performance with heat sink implementation
